entry.title: Beyond the Score: Why “Explain Your Thinking” Matters
entry.summary: Learn how Explain Your Thinking helps educators use AI to make student reasoning visible and improve feedback, assessment, and intervention.

entry.summary: Sal Khan reflects on Khanmigo's first chapter, what AI tutoring taught us, and how Khan Academy is building better support for students.

entry.summary: Credential Engine’s recently launched Issuer Identity Registry (IIR) marks an important step toward strengthening trust in digital credentials. By enabling organizations to verify the identity of credential issuers, the IIR...

entry.title: Best Free TEKS-Aligned Science Resources for Texas Teachers This Year
entry.summary: Explore Khan Academy’s free TEKS-aligned science resources for Texas teachers, including new 6th Grade Science, 7th Grade Science, and IPC courses.

entry.title: 7 Ways Texas Math Teachers Can Use Khan Academy’s Complete TEKS-Aligned Math Sequence
entry.summary: Explore 7 ways Texas math teachers can use Khan Academy’s free TEKS-aligned math courses, now spanning grades 3–12 with new Statistics and Financial Mathematics resources.

entry.title: The Best Early Learning Apps for Kids: A Parent and Teacher Guide
entry.summary: Looking for the best early learning apps for kids? We reviewed 9 top-rated, ad-free options — including Khan Academy Kids, PBS Kids, Pok Pok, and more — so parents and teachers don't have to guess.

entry.title: Five Ways Khan Academy Is Making Student Practice More Motivating
entry.summary: Gem Challenges build on the spirit of LearnStorm, helping students see their progress, earn Gems, and work together toward shared class goals.

entry.title: Built in the Open: How Pilot Districts Shaped the Reimagined Khan Academy
entry.summary: See how pilot districts shaped the reimagined Khan Academy with integrated Khanmigo support, clearer learning paths, and tools that keep students motivated.

entry.title: Kodi On The Go: Bring Kodi Bear on Your Summer Adventures
entry.summary: Meet your child's new summer travel buddy. Print, color, and cut out Kodi Bear and bring her on every road trip, beach day, and backyard adventure this summer. Share your photos with #KodiOnTheGo.

entry.title: The Duality of May: Why Global Accessibility Awareness Day Hits Differently
entry.summary: Explore how Khan Academy celebrated Global Accessibility Awareness Day through reflection, firsthand feedback, a no-mouse challenge, and accessibility fixes.

entry.summary: Forsyth Technical Community College and Credential Engine will work to leverage the power of transparent credential data to strengthen the region’s education and training market.

entry.title: U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon Issues Statement on the House Education and Workforce Committee’s “Less Bureaucracy, Better Education” Legislative Package
entry.summary: Today, U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon released the following statement in response to the House Education and Workforce Committee’s passage of the “Less Bureaucracy, Better Education” legislative package.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Education Launches National K-12 Initiative to Protect Students from Adult Sexual Predators in Schools
entry.summary: The U.S. Department of Education’s Office for Civil Rights (OCR) today launched a national K-12 initiative to crack down on sexual predators in schools.

entry.title: Secretary McMahon’s Vision for 250 Years of American Innovation at the Great American State Fair
entry.summary: Secretary McMahon delivers a keynote address at 'The Next 250 – Innovation' event at the Great American State Fair.

entry.title: “Presidential 1776 Award: The Ultimate Civics Showdown” Draws 1.63 Million Live Viewers
entry.summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Education (the Department) celebrates the success of the Presidential 1776 Award: The Ultimate Civics Showdown, with 1.63 million people tuning in.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Education Holds First-of-its-Kind Higher Education Fraud Summit
entry.summary: Yesterday, the U.S. Department of Education held the first-of-its-kind Higher Education Fraud Summit featuring Under Secretary of Education Nicholas Kent.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Education Approves Arkansas’ Returning Education to the States Waiver, Other Education Flexibilities
entry.summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Education (ED) granted a major set of flexibilities that will allow Arkansas to streamline federal compliance requirements and enhance the state’s ability to serve its students.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Education Marks End of Second Annual Title IX Month with Major Enforcement Recap
entry.summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Education (the Department) marked the conclusion of the second annual ‘Title IX Month’ – honoring the fifty-fourth anniversary of Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972 (Title IX).

entry.title: Fact Sheet: The Trump Administration is Making Higher Education More Affordable, Expanding Opportunity, and Simplifying Student Loan Repayment
entry.summary: Effective today, July 1, 2026, key provisions of President Trump’s Working Families Tax Cuts Act (the Act) take effect.

entry.title: “Presidential 1776 Award: The Ultimate Civics Showdown” to Air on CBS Tonight
entry.summary: The “Presidential 1776 Award: The Ultimate Civics Showdown” will air on June 30, 2026 from 8:00-9:30 PM ET on the CBS Television Network, and will be available to stream on July 1, 2026 on Paramount+.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Education Announces Elimination of Unnecessary Burdens on Career and Technical Education Programs
entry.summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Education’s Office for Civil Rights announced a significant deregulatory action, taking an important step to reduce unnecessary red tape and burdensome administrative requirements for states and schools.

entry.title: U.S. Department of Education Investigates Five Medical Schools as Trump Administration Pushes to End Racial Discrimination in Admissions
entry.summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Education’s Office for Civil Rights launched new investigations into five medical schools across the country for alleged racial discrimination in admissions.

entry.title: Edtech Security: From Shared Practice to Concrete Action | 1EdTech
entry.summary: A few weeks ago I wrote that cybersecurity in our sector is a shared responsibility , and that the honest question underneath every incident is not "which vendor failed?" but "who is responsible for what?" The 1EdTech Board of Directors unanimously supported that response and the feedback from members, institutional leaders, and technology providers was immediate and constructive. The consistent message: agreement on the principle, and a desire to see it turned into specifics.

entry.title: From Opening the Door to Belonging in the Building: Why LTI 1.3 Matters | 1EdTech

entry.title: Together Is the New Standard: Building the Infrastructure for What Comes Next | 1EdTech

entry.title: Interoperability and the Screen Time Debate: Finding the Right Balance | 1EdTech
entry.summary: Screen time has become one of the most debated topics in education. Parents, educators, and policymakers often ask: How much is too much? But a more useful question is: How meaningful is that time?

entry.title: Higher Education & The Trump Administration
entry.summary: Executive orders, agency memos and directives, news stories and other resources on the Trump administration's first weeks in office.

entry.title: NOVA President Anne Kress to Serve as ACE Board Chair
entry.summary: ACE’s membership also elected Robert W. Iuliano​, president of Gettysburg College, as Boa​rd vice-chair, and also elected a slate​​ of new Board members, all of whom also will begin their terms on Oct. 1, 2026.

entry.title: New ACE Guidance Helps Colleges Navigate Ethics Rules for Campus Visits
entry.summary: ACE has released a new issue brief clarifying federal ethics rules for hosting members of Congress and executive branch officials on campus, as colleges and universities navigate today's complex political climate.

entry.title: 2025 Freshman Survey Shines Light on Views of Entering College Students
entry.summary: The 2025 CIRP Freshman Survey features key insights about how entering college students are approaching higher education in a changing context in which questions about cost, value, well-being, and future opportunities are becoming even more important.
